stimulus:
[Bar graph: Percentage of Surveyed Patients Who Mentioned Various Factors. Three factors shown, vertical axis 0–80%.]

  • wait time: about 65%
  • cost of treatment: about 40%
  • staff politeness: about 20%
stem: According to the graph, about what percentage of patients mentioned the cost of treatment in the interviews?
rationale:
Choice B is correct because the graph shows that about 40% of patients mentioned the cost of treatment.

Choice A is incorrect: 20% mentioned staff politeness, not cost. Choice C is incorrect: 65% mentioned wait time, not cost. Choice D is incorrect: no factor reached 85% in the graph.
